name: tpl-customs-clearance
description: Customs clearance: fetch commercial invoice and packing list, classify HS codes per line item, route restricted items for compliance review, calculate duties via tariff API, prepare and submit customs declaration, then notify on clearance or query

steps.prompt:
You are a licensed customs broker. Classify each line item in the commercial invoice with the correct Harmonized System (HS) tariff code for import at {{port_of_entry}}.

Shipment reference: {{shipment_ref}}
Importer: {{importer_name}} (Tax ID: {{importer_tax_id}})
Port of entry: {{port_of_entry}}
Shipping documents: {{steps.fetch-shipping-documents.output}}

For each line item in the commercial invoice, determine: (1) the 6-digit or 10-digit HS code most appropriate for the described goods; (2) whether the goods fall under any restricted, controlled, or prohibited category (e.g., CITES, dual-use, sanctions list items, food/agricultural restrictions, chemical precursors).

Output plain text with labeled sections:
- line_item_classifications: JSON array of objects with fields: line_number, description, quantity, unit_value_usd, hs_code, hs_description, country_of_origin, restricted (boolean), restriction_reason (empty string if not restricted)
- has_restricted_items: true if any line item has restricted = true, else false
- restricted_item_count: integer count of restricted line items
- total_shipment_value_usd: sum of all (quantity * unit_value_usd) across all line items (as a number)
